verses.1: Cast your bread on the waters;
verses.2: Give a portion to seven, yes, even to eight;
verses.3: If the clouds are full of rain, they empty themselves on the earth;
verses.4: He who observes the wind won’t sow;
verses.5: As you don’t know what is the way of the wind,
verses.6: In the morning sow your seed,
verses.8: Yes, if a man lives many years, let him rejoice in them all;
verses.9: Rejoice, young man, in your youth,
verses.10: Therefore remove sorrow from your heart,
